_meta.name: SODA design tokens
_meta.principle: Values are platform neutral. Behavior is applied per platform from these primitives.
compiles_to: web: CSS custom properties via Style Dictionary or a small script
native: TypeScript theme imported by Expo
_meta.rule: If a value appears in CSS or a React Native style and does not trace here, that is drift.

_changelog.change: Baseline tokens established from the Live-Fire build. Responsive layer added: tapMin 44, gridMin 150, fluid gutter and fluid type.

Grid system. Spacing snapped to a 4px base grid. Type set to a base 16 minor third 1.2 scale in rem. Leading locked so each line-height resolves to a multiple of 4. Tracking moved to em. Radius snapped to the 8 12 16 20 24 ladder. Fluid clamp type retired in favor of fixed rem sizes so text sits on the baseline.

Font families retired. display, ui, mono, signature set to TBD (Archivo Black, DM Sans, DM Mono, Caveat killed). Roles and the type scale are unchanged; new families are chosen later and set only here. Applies to web and native equally: Expo loads the same families via expo-font, with no browser fallback.

Fonts CHOSEN: display and ui are Be Vietnam Pro (weight carries the display role, 800-900 vs 300-600), mono is DM Mono. Per the attendee-rebuild decision: the Onboarding handoff's direction wins over the attendee file's Archivo/Hanken Grotesk/Space Mono. signature stays retired (no script font in the new system). Both families are Google Fonts, Expo-loadable.

_versioning: Patch for a value tweak, minor for a new token, major for a change that breaks a contract. Bump version and add a changelog entry on every change.

_naming.source: Keys here are canonical, camelCase for multi-word names.
_naming.css: The compiler emits kebab-case custom properties. greenDeep becomes --green-deep.
_naming.js: The compiler emits camelCase theme keys, identical to the keys here.
_naming.docs: SODA-Handoff.json and the inventory write the same tokens in snake_case for reading, for example green_deep. Same token, reader-facing spelling.

colorUsage._note: avatar color is per person and is separate from these cues

font._status: Chosen 2026-07-06 (attendee rebuild). One family, two roles: display = Be Vietnam Pro 800/900, ui = Be Vietnam Pro 300-600. signature retired.
font._load: web via next/font, native via expo-font, same family names. Native has NO browser fallback, so the chosen family must ship as a loadable font in Expo (a bundled .ttf/.otf or an @expo-google-fonts package).

grid._note: Everything resolves to a multiple of 4. Spacing, radius, and the baseline that leading locks to.

type._model: Base 16, minor third ratio 1.2. Sizes in rem so iOS Dynamic Type scales the whole grid together. Leading is unitless and resolves to a multiple of 4 at base size, which locks text to the baseline. Tracking is em so it scales with the size.
type._apply: web: font-size rem, line-height unitless, letter-spacing em. native: fontSize = rem*16, lineHeight = round(size*leading), letterSpacing = size*tracking.

leading._note: per-size leading lives in scale.*.leading; solid is for large numerals

signature._note: Caveat is decorative and intentionally exempt from the baseline grid

gutter._note: the only spacing token that flexes; min and max are both on the grid

motion.reduceMotion: drop all durations to 0 when the OS requests reduced motion

_helpers.gutter: clamp(min, width*vw/100, max) on web via CSS clamp, same formula on native
